selection: 按 4–7 岁 阅读者的常用词频与中小学词汇标记筛选

words.translation: n. 一点点, 少许, 一会儿, 短时间；a. 小的, 很少的, 幼小的, 琐碎的, 短暂的, 矮小的
words.definition: n. a small amount or duration

words.translation: n. 音乐, 乐曲
words.definition: n. an artistic form of auditory communication incorporating instrumental or vocal tones in a structured and continuous manner

words.translation: n. 例证, 插图
words.definition: n. artwork that helps make something clear or attractive

words.translation: n. 名字, 名称, 姓名, 名义, 名誉, 文件名；vt. 命名, 称呼, 任命, 提名, 列举
words.definition: n. a language unit by which a person or thing is known

words.translation: n. 跳舞, 舞蹈, 舞会；v. 跳舞
words.definition: n. an artistic form of nonverbal communication

words.translation: n. 爱, 恋爱, 爱情, 爱好, 性爱；vt. 爱, 爱好, 爱慕
words.definition: n. a strong positive emotion of regard and affection

words.translation: n. 妻子, 太太, 夫人
words.definition: n. a married woman; a man's partner in marriage

words.translation: n. 无, 不关紧要之事, 零；adv. 毫不, 决不
words.definition: n. a quantity of no importance

words.translation: n. 便士, 一分, 小钱, 点滴
words.definition: n. a fractional monetary unit of Ireland and the United Kingdom; equal to one hundredth of a pound

words.translation: prep. 在...之上, 迫近, 紧接着
words.definition: prep. On; -- used in all the senses of that word, with which it

words.translation: adv. 离去
words.definition: r. from a particular thing or place or position (`forth' is obsolete)

words.translation: vt. 买, 获得；vi. 买
words.definition: v. obtain by purchase; acquire by means of a financial transaction

words.translation: n. 水, 雨水, 海水, 水位, 水面, 流水；vt. 给...浇水, 供以水, 注入水, 使湿
words.definition: n. binary compound that occurs at room temperature as a clear colorless odorless tasteless liquid; freezes into ice below 0 degrees centigrade and boils above 1

words.translation: v. 吃, 腐蚀
words.definition: v. take in solid food

words.translation: adv. 一点也不, 毫不；pron. 没有人, 无一物, 并无一个
words.definition: r. not at all or in no way

words.translation: a. 漂亮的, 优美的, 机灵的, 狡猾的, 恰当的；adv. 相当, 颇
words.definition: s. pleasing by delicacy or grace; not imposing

words.translation: n. 进位, 射程, 运载；vt. 携带, 运送, 支持, 传送, 包含
words.definition: n. the act of carrying something

words.translation: n. 苍蝇, 两翼昆虫, 飞行；vi. 飞, 飞翔, 飘扬, 逃走
words.definition: n. two-winged insects characterized by active flight

words.translation: n. 猫, 恶妇；vi. 呕吐
words.definition: n. feline mammal usually having thick soft fur and no ability to roar: domestic cats; wildcats

words.translation: n. 亲爱的人；a. 亲爱的, 昂贵的, 严重的, 急迫的
a. 人工制成的, 成功的, 创造的；make的过去式和过去分词
words.definition: s. produced by a manufacturing process; rope and nails"

words.translation: a. 热的, 热心的, 辣的, 热情的, 激动的, 猛烈的, 紧迫的；adv. 热, 紧迫地
words.definition: a. used of physical heat; having a high or higher than desirable temperature or giving off heat or feeling or causing a sensation of heat or burning

words.translation: n. 摇动, 震动；vt. 摇动, 动摇, 使震动, 挥舞
n. 船, 舰；vt. 以船运送, 装船, 运送
words.definition: n. a vessel that carries passengers or freight

words.translation: n. 木材, 木制品；vt. 植林于, 给...添加木柴
words.definition: n. the hard fibrous lignified substance under the bark of trees

words.translation: n. 切口, 割伤, 降低, 切, 割, 砍, 削, 伤口, 削减, 缩短, 删节, 通路；a. 经切割的, 缩减的
words.definition: n. a share of the profits

words.translation: a. 欢快的, 艳丽的, 快乐的, 放荡的
words.definition: s. full of or showing high-spirited merriment

words.translation: vt. 花费, 浪费, 度过, 消耗, 消磨；vi. 花费, 用尽
words.definition: v. pass time in a specific way

words.translation: n. 月亮, 月球, 月光；vi. 闲荡
words.definition: n. the natural satellite of the Earth

words.translation: n. 吨
n. 蜜蜂, 聚会
words.definition: n. any of numerous hairy-bodied insects including social and solitary species

words.translation: n. 桥, 舰桥, 桥梁, 桥牌；vt. 架桥于, 跨越
words.definition: n. a structure that allows people or vehicles to cross an obstacle such as a river or canal or railway etc.

words.translation: n. 叫声, 哭声, 大叫；vi. 哭, 叫, 喊
words.definition: n. a loud utterance; often in protest or opposition

words.translation: n. 狗, 坏蛋；vt. 跟踪, 尾随
words.definition: n. a member of the genus Canis (probably descended from the common wolf) that has been domesticated by man since prehistoric times; occurs in many breeds

words.translation: n. 海, 海洋, 海浪, 大量
words.definition: n. a division of an ocean or a large body of salt water partially enclosed by land

words.translation: n. 树, 木料, 树状物；vt. 把...赶上树
words.definition: n. a tall perennial woody plant having a main trunk and branches forming a distinct elevated crown; includes both gymnosperms and angiosperms

words.translation: n. 空气, 旋律, 态度；vt. 晾, 使通风, 夸耀
words.definition: n. a mixture of gases (especially oxygen) required for breathing; the stuff that the wind consists of

words.translation: v. 建立, 建筑；n. 构造, 体格
words.definition: v. build or establish something abstract

words.translation: n. 十字架, 十字架形物件, 交叉, 十字标, 交叉路, 磨难, 杂交；a. 生气的, 交叉的, 相反的
words.definition: n. a wooden structure consisting of an upright post with a transverse piece

words.translation: n. 市场, 交易, 集市, 推销地区, 行情, 市面, 销路；vt. 在市场上交易, 使上市, 销售
words.definition: n. the world of commercial activity where goods and services are bought and sold

words.translation: n. 纸, 文件, 文章, 报纸, 证券, 证件；vt. 用纸糊, 贴壁纸于, 用纸包装
words.definition: n. a material made of cellulose pulp derived mainly from wood or rags or certain grasses

words.translation: n. 鼓, 鼓声；vi. 击鼓, 作鼓声
words.definition: n. a musical percussion instrument; usually consists of a hollow cylinder with a membrane stretched across each end

words.translation: n. 光, 光亮, 灯, 日光, 发光体, 光源, 杰出人物, 火花, 眼光；a. 轻的, 少量的, 轻微的, 轻快的, 轻浮的, 明亮的, 淡色的, 容易的
words.definition: n. (physics) electromagnetic radiation that can produce a visual sensation

words.translation: n. 饮料, 酒；v. 喝, 喝酒
words.definition: n. a single serving of a beverage

words.translation: n. 黄金, 钱财, 金块, 金色, 宝贵；a. 金的, 似金的, 金色的, 金制的
words.definition: n. coins made of gold

words.translation: n. 家, 避难所, 故乡；a. 家庭的, 国内的, 打中目标的
words.definition: n. where you live at a particular time

words.translation: n. 淑女, 夫人, 女士, 贵妇
words.definition: n. a polite name for any woman

words.translation: n. 北方, 北；a. 北的, 北方的
words.definition: n. the region of the United States lying to the north of the Mason-Dixon line

words.translation: a. 贫穷的, 贫乏的, 不幸的, 可怜的, 拙劣的, 卑鄙的
words.definition: a. having little money or few possessions

words.translation: n. 石头, 宝石, 果核, 纪念碑, 结石；vt. 投扔石子, 铺石头
words.definition: n. building material consisting of a piece of rock hewn in a definite shape for a special purpose

words.translation: n. 风, 气息, 气味, 呼吸, 风声, 趋势, 空谈, 卷绕, 弯曲；vt. 使通风, 嗅出, 使喘气, 吹号角, 上发条, 缠绕, 包, 绞起, 吊起, 使弯曲, 使迂回
words.definition: n. air moving (sometimes with considerable force) from an area of high pressure to an area of low pressure

words.translation: vi. 死亡, 消逝, 平息, 熄灭, 漠然, 渴望；vt. 死
words.definition: v. pass from physical life and lose all bodily attributes and functions necessary to sustain life

words.translation: n. 头, 头脑, 领袖, 脑袋, 最前的部分；vt. 为首, 朝向, 前进, 用头顶

words.translation: n. 早晨, 早上, 初期

words.translation: adv. 一次, 曾经, 一旦；conj. 一旦, 一经

words.translation: vt. 卖, 背叛, 销售, 出卖；vi. 卖, 销售

words.translation: n. 白色, 洁白, 眼白, 白种人, 蛋白；a. 白色的, 纯洁的, 白种的, 苍白的, 空白的, 幸运的

words.translation: n. 乳酪

words.translation: vt. 借, 贷款给, 增添, 提供, 出租；vi. 贷款

words.translation: n. 发射, 炮弹, 射击, 射手, 投篮, 射门, 子弹, 射程, 拍摄, 注射；vt. 装弹, 使成颗粒状

words.translation: num. 六, 六个
